description: Recalculate all formulas in an .xlsx/.xlsm workbook via LibreOffice and scan every cell for Excel errors, emitting a JSON report.
rules: read-only report — never edits the workbook's structure/data, only re-evaluates formulas in place and reports
drives LibreOffice headless (soffice) to compute formula values; openpyxl reloads to count formulas + locate errors
report written to record_store as recalc.json
usage: Set XLSX_FILE (path to the workbook). Optional RECALC_TIMEOUT (seconds, default 30). Output: recalc.json with status/total_errors/total_formulas/error_summary.
limitation: Formula recalculation requires LibreOffice (soffice on PATH); without it the report carries an error field but the perk still emits valid JSON. Requires openpyxl. gcc is only needed where AF_UNIX sockets are blocked.
